title: Acana Monitoring Moth Trap - Ideal for Protecting Clothes, Carpets & Soft Furnishings - Home & Surfaces - Traps Moths, Pheromone Technology - Harsh Chemical Free - Refillable
features: NO HARSH CHEMICALS. Specially developed to attract and trap moths, this trap does not use any harsh chemicals, making it perfect for a family home
FIRST ALERT. Uniquely designed as a Control Product - Checks for any moth infestation as a First Alert. Also monitors the effectiveness of your ACANA Moth Treatments
LATEST PHEROMONE TECHNOLOGY. Using pheromone technology, the moths are easily attracted and trapped thus freeing your living space of the pesky unwanted visitors

LARGE STICKY SURFACE AREA. Easily hangs, stands or attaches to most surfaces, each pad lasts up to 8 weeks, making it a convenient and easy to use pest control solution. The Large 100 sq. cm Sticky Surface Area it is the largest on the market
END OF LIFE INDICATOR. With the unique Visual End of Lifetime strip Indicator. Pads are refillable, Refill Packs also available and sold separately
